value.found_quote: Beyond these built-in subagents, you can create your own with custom prompts, tool restrictions, permission modes, hooks, and skills.
value.rationale: The page explicitly states that users can create custom subagents with custom prompts, tool restrictions, permission modes, hooks, and skills — matching all elements of the claim. The page further substantiates this with detailed documentation on how to create subagents via the /agents command or manually via Markdown files with YAML frontmatter, covering configuration of tools, permissionMode, hooks, and skills fields.
